name: @ds/peitho
description: Peitho — DS2 outreach research engine. Runs a web-grounded Claude research pass over a marketing lead and synthesizes a structured, cited company brief (overview, ICP, ranked pain points, market, competitors, recent signals, outreach angle, talking points) with confidence + cost accounting. Pure deterministic core + two quarantined Claude calls (research with web tools → toolless structured synthesis); fact-checked.
